prestazioni: Engine swap to a Jaguar AJ-V8 5.0L supercharged (AJ133) with a Harrop HTV2300 supercharger upgrade, supporting 650hp at 12psi boost, paired with a custom Motec M150 ECU and a PWR radiator for heat management

Full drivetrain reinforcement with a Quaife ATB differential (front and rear) and a strengthened R380 gearbox with a custom bellhousing adapter for the AJ133, alongside a South Bend Clutch dual-disc setup for torque handling

Suspension overhaul with Bilstein B16 coilovers (8-way adjustable damping) and Eibach Pro-Kit springs, combined with a custom-fabricated subframe brace from Alloy Technologies and polybushings from SuperPro for chassis rigidity
estetica: Full widebody conversion using a JE Motorsport Defender 110 kit, featuring carbon fiber fender flares, a vented hood, and a custom rear diffuser with integrated twin exhaust outlets for the AJ-V8

Front bumper replacement with a Rally Raid Products HD winch bumper, equipped with a Warn Zeon 12-S Platinum winch and auxiliary LED light pods from Rigid Industries (D-Series Pro), paired with a custom aluminum skid plate

Interior rework with Recaro Pole Position seats (carbon fiber backs), a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel on a NRG quick-release hub, and a full digital dash from Race Technology (DL1 data logger with AIM MXS display)
